title: Admiral Framework Hook Manifest
description: Schema for hook.manifest.json files. Every hook in the Admiral Framework must ship with a manifest conforming to this schema.

name.description: Hook identifier. Lowercase alphanumeric with underscores. Must match the directory name under hooks/.

version.description: Semantic version of the hook implementation.

events.description: Lifecycle events this hook binds to.

requires.description: Names of hooks that must be active in the session for this hook to function.

input_contract.description: Contract version string (e.g., 'v1'). Hooks with the same version are wire-compatible.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this hook does.

async.description: If true, hook executes asynchronously and does not block the agent.
